title: Remove "Tears" Music Disc
description: This simple data pack remove the drop of the "Tears" music disc from Ghasts when killed by their own reflected fireball.
body:
This simple data pack remove the drop of the "Tears" music disc from Ghasts when killed by their own reflected fireball.

**What it does:**

- Prevents Ghasts from dropping the "Tears" music disc
- All other Ghast drops (ghast tears, gunpowder) remain unchanged

**Installation:**

1. Download the datapack `.zip` file.
1. Place it in the datapacks folder of your world save.
1. Type `/reload` in-game.
